note: Harder toy: 8 actions (4 cardinals + 4 diagonals at ~equal magnitude). Pixel-delta head start=16, pixel_cf_allact, step=20, K=8, 10000 steps, 3 seeds.
verdict: partial scaling: render stays crisp + all codes used, but discovery degrades (0.9 -> 0.62) — several codes conflate 2 actions (diagonals vs cardinals). K=8 gives no code slack.
